title: Wine
subtitle: All canned. We pour into a proper glass.
note: You may notice that we use only canned wines. This is because we don’t go through a ton of wine and cans preserve a product’s freshness better than a bottle would. When ordered, we pour the wine into a proper glass.

items.name: Archer Roose — Malbec
items.style: Dark ripe fruit, with notes of vanilla, blackberry & plum

items.name: Archer Roose — Rosé
items.style: Dry and fruit-forward, with notes of strawberry, raspberry & apricot

items.name: Archer Roose — Sauvignon Blanc
items.style: Tropical citrus & grapefruit notes with a balanced minerality
